query:
WITH new_token AS (
                SELECT gen_random_uuid()::text AS secret
            )
            INSERT INTO refresh_tokens (user_id, multi_use, valid_for, hash, detail)
            SELECT
                $1,
                $2,
                $3::text::interval,
                crypt(nt.secret, gen_salt('bf')),
                $4
            FROM new_token nt
            RETURNING
                id AS "id!: models::Id",
                (SELECT secret FROM new_token) AS "secret!: String"
